chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1396 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution 24-09-2025 On 10-09-2025 the following order was passed;- “None present for the petitioners; no intimation is received. Even compliance of office objection has not been made. Under the circumstances, this petition is liable to be dismissed for non- prosecution; however, in the interest of justice, adjourned to 24-09-2025, for which intimation notice be issued to counsel for the petitioner with direction to comply with office objections.” Though intimation notice was issued to the Counsel for the petitioner to comply with the office objection, but even then no one has turned up to pursue the matter, which is pending without any useful progress. The deliberate absence coupled with non-compliance of the office objection, on the part of the Petitioner and his Counsel prima facie suggests either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
